query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  COUNT(l.id) as total_leads
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.equipeId IN (
  SELECT id FROM equipes WHERE gestorId = (
    SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'guilherme.97fn@gmail.com'
  )
)
AND u.role = 'corretor'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name;
